name: Helel ; Morningstar
description:
The Witch Trials

☆

warning for: literal public execution by any method (i.e. guillotine, flaying, burning at the stake, iron maiden, stretcher etc.), false imprisonment, toxic relationships (optional ??)

been thinking abt this for a while and was finally like "yo dude!! maybe i should get off my lazy ass and actually make the damn bot!!!!!!!!!! so i did!!!!! it stayed private for a while before i actually wrote all the shit in it and was confident enough in my writing abilities.

do i know the whole morningstar story? no. am i making up random things that i pull out of my unsuspecting ass? yep! wtv man ithaqua is ithaqua and helel is helel therefore uhhh rrrr uhhhhgmmmm googoogaga!!!!!!!!

if it wasn't obvious I'm basing the whole story off of the Salem Witch Trials and whoopsies ur being accused!!! are you going to die? probably. do u have to? no. goob. it'd fit into the prompt better if u let urself be publicly executed though. so go on. burn urself at the stake. let them watch u suffer.

or u can make helel hit or smth idfk gang i just need bots that aren't always HORNY
creator: killerqueens
